##### INTEGRATION TYPES

## **ATS**, **LMS** and **HR** Integrations

Manage your hiring process in one, centralized location. eSkill's talent assessment platform connects with top HR and ATS systems, allowing you to send pre-hire assessments, measure results, and extend offers all from one platform.

Need a custom solution? Reach out to see how our flexible API can help eSkill fit into your existing tech stack.

##### INTEGRATION PERKS

## Optimize hiring with eSkill's integrations.

Managing your hiring process shouldn’t be complicated. With eSkill’s integrations, you can send tests, analyze results, and hire better — all while saving valuable time and resources. With an eSkill integration, you can:

### Send Assessments

Stop bouncing back and forth between platforms. Send talent assessments directly from your ATS.

### Measure Results

Get talent assessment results delivered straight to your ATS. Easily track candidates as they move through the hiring funnel, and use data to hire the right fit.

### Increase Hiring Accuracy

Ensure consistent, data-driven hiring decisions with real-time access to pre-hire testing results and candidate progress.

### Integration Options

Keep hiring managers, recruiters, and HR teams aligned with centralized, easy-to-access talent assessment insights

### Save Time & Boost Productivity

Streamline your pre-employment assessment process and focus on selecting top talent instead of managing disjointed, disconnected platforms.

##### HOW TO INTEGRATE

## Integration **Functionality**

With eSkill's applicant tracking system integrations, you can send assessments and receive results directly within your HR system, eliminating the need to switch between platforms or manually enter candidate data. This ensures a streamlined, accurate, and automated hiring process from start to finish. Here’s how a typical integrated workflow works:

* 1
 
 ### Assessment Creation
 
 Pre-employment assessments are created in eSkill and automatically sync with your HR or ATS system, making them available for candidate assignment.
 
* 2
 
 ### Candidate Eligibility
 
 Once a candidate completes an application or other prerequisite hiring steps, they become eligible for a pre-employment testing.
 
* 3
 
 ### Assessment Invitation
 
 eSkill's testing integration will send the relevant assessment to candidates directly from your ATS, ensuring a seamless experience.
 
* 4
 
 ### Results Syncing
 
 Once the candidate completes the hiring assessment, the results are instantly recorded within their profile in your HR system — eliminating manual data entry and review scores in real time.
 

Hand pointing at performance dashboard with colored progress bars on a laptop screen.
